_comment: Stage settings-pr1p — TypeScript checkJs setup. We do NOT compile TS files (this is a pure JS codebase); we use tsc --noEmit to type-check JS files that opt in via // @ts-check at the top. This delivers most of the type-safety benefit without forcing a TS migration. New files in lib/ and any file with completed JSDoc should add // @ts-check; the long tail can be migrated incrementally per the Boy Scout Rule (see CONTRIBUTING.md). | checkJs is FALSE so files without // @ts-check are silently allowed -- we don't want to drown the typecheck output by failing on every long-tail file. Files that opt in via // @ts-check at line 1 get full strict checking because their JSDoc covers every public function. Migrate other files incrementally per the Boy Scout Rule.
